query: DELETE FROM organizations WHERE id IN (30001, 30002) AND (name, domain) IN (SELECT name, domain FROM (SELECT name, domain, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM organizations WHERE id IN (30001, 30002) GROUP BY name, domain HAVING cnt > 1) t); DELETE FROM operating_units WHERE organizationId IN (30001, 30002) AND id IN (30001, 30002, 60005, 90001);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3DLEw35gkkimUcv.eeb1f1cd43d3 --database 6e38zfddYazj4vVoRnY5Mj --execute DELETE FROM organizations WHERE id IN (30001, 30002) AND (name, domain) IN (SELECT name, domain FROM (SELECT name, domain, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM organizations WHERE id IN (30001, 30002) GROUP BY name, domain HAVING cnt > 1) t); DELETE FROM operating_units WHERE organizationId IN (30001, 30002) AND id IN (30001, 30002, 60005, 90001);
